## What should be improved?

Describe the unclear section, missing example, or confusing workflow step.

## Why does it matter?

Explain how this helps Amazon sellers, product managers, or agent users make better decisions.

## Suggested change

Add a short draft, outline, or example if possible.

## Privacy check

- [ ] This issue does not include private seller data, raw ASIN exports, screenshots, credentials, supplier quotes, paid-tool exports, or customer records.
